raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California's state budget includes $262.6 billion in total funding.",
    "The budget allocates $12 billion to tackle homelessness over the next two years.",
    "California is providing $5.2 billion to cover 100% of back rent and up to three months of advance rent for eligible tenants and landlords.",
    "The budget allocates $50 million for affordable farmworker housing.",
    "There is an allocation of $3 million for the development of Farmworker Resource Centers.",
    "The budget includes $23.37 million in funding for the Low-Income Weatherization Program aimed at low-income farmworkers.",
    "The budget includes $200 million in new funding to expand the Golden State Teacher Grant program to help meet staffing needs in education.",
    "The budget allocates $436 million in new funding for sustainable and equity agricultural programs.",
    "The budget includes $1.385 billion in funding for drinking water and wastewater projects, as well as groundwater cleanup and water recycling projects.",
    "The budget invests $3.7 billion in a Climate Resiliency Package to address the impacts of climate change."
  ]
}
```
